title: stelis pendularis
intro: Stelis pendularis, also known as the Hanging Stelis, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic acids content. The health benefits of Stelis pendularis include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Stelis pendularis can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
